name: Yechiu Metal Recycling (China) Ltd.
summary: Yechiu Metal Recycling (China) Ltd. engages in aluminum recycling business in Asia and the United States. It produces and sells aluminum alloy ingots for use in automotive, power tool, telecommunication, hardware, and home appliance industries. The company was formerly known as Ye Chiu Metal Taicang Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yechiu Metal Recycling (China) Ltd. in 2009. Yechiu Metal Recycling (China) Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Taicang, China.
